meta.title: Frontier News | Curated Tech News and AI Summaries
meta.description: Follow important technology updates without watching every video. Frontier News turns trusted YouTube content into concise summaries and newsletters.

hero.h1: The tech news worth your attention
hero.lead: Frontier News monitors trusted technology channels and turns their latest videos into concise, useful summaries. Get the important ideas, tools, and techniques without spending hours watching.
hero.support: Free daily updates. Choose your preferred language.

value.h2: Keep up with technology without the noise
value.body: Technology moves quickly, but useful information is scattered across long videos, product announcements, and creator channels. Frontier News follows selected technology sources, extracts the main points, and organizes them into a digest you can read in minutes. Each summary covers the practical details: what changed, why it matters, which tools were mentioned, and what you can apply.

cards.text: Understand long technology videos through concise summaries.
Discover software, frameworks, and services mentioned by trusted creators.
Focus on techniques and ideas you can use, rather than empty headlines.

topics.intro: Frontier News follows developments that matter to developers, technical leaders, and people building software products.
topics.empty: New summaries for this topic will appear here as they are published.

how.h2: From technology videos to useful news

steps.title: We monitor selected channels
steps.text: Frontier News checks trusted technology creators for new videos.

steps.title: We analyze the content
steps.text: Transcripts are processed to identify key points, tools, techniques, and practical takeaways.

steps.title: You receive a concise digest
steps.text: Read summaries on the web or receive them by email, Substack, or Microsoft Teams.

newsletter.h2: Get the important technology updates in your inbox
newsletter.intro: Receive Frontier News daily in your preferred language.
newsletter.trust: No spam. Confirm your email before receiving your first issue. Unsubscribe at any time.
newsletter.success: Almost there! Check your inbox to confirm your subscription.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

audience.h2: Built for people who work in technology

about.body: Frontier News is created by Hyperjump Technology to help technical teams follow meaningful developments across software, AI, infrastructure, and developer tooling.
about.title: About Frontier News | Hyperjump Technology
about.description: Frontier News is published by Hyperjump Technology — curated tech news and AI summaries from trusted YouTube channels.
about.intro: Frontier News is created by Hyperjump Technology to help technical teams follow meaningful developments across software, AI, infrastructure, and developer tooling.

items.a: Frontier News is a technology monitoring and newsletter service that turns videos from selected YouTube channels into concise, structured summaries.
Yes. Frontier News is free to subscribe. You can receive daily or weekly digests at no cost. Premium delivery channels may be introduced later without changing the free web and email tiers.

items.q: How often will I receive the newsletter?
Which technology topics does Frontier News cover?
items.a: Coverage includes AI, software development, cloud infrastructure, DevOps, cybersecurity, open source, and developer tools.

items.q: Are the summaries written by AI?
items.a: Frontier News uses language models to analyze transcripts and produce structured summaries. Each summary links back to its original source so readers can verify the context.
Frontier News supports English, Indonesian, German, Italian, French, Arabic, Japanese, and Sundanese.

finalCta.h2: Spend less time searching. Keep up with what matters.
finalCta.text: Get concise technology news and practical summaries delivered on your schedule.

digests.title: Digest archive | Frontier News
digests.description: Browse the Frontier News digest archive — curated technology summaries from trusted YouTube channels.
digests.intro: Every published summary in one place, newest first.

privacy.title: Privacy policy | Frontier News
privacy.description: How Frontier News by Hyperjump Technology collects, uses, and protects subscriber information.

sections.p: Frontier News is published by Hyperjump Technology. This policy explains how we handle information when you browse the site or subscribe to the newsletter.

When you subscribe, we collect your email address, preferred delivery frequency, preferred language, and your consent record. Server logs may include IP address and basic device information for security and performance.
We use your details to send the Frontier News digest you requested, confirm subscriptions, manage preferences, and improve delivery reliability. We do not sell personal information.
You must confirm your email before receiving the first issue. You can unsubscribe at any time using the link in every email or the subscription preferences page.

terms.title: Terms of use | Frontier News
terms.description: Terms of use for Frontier News, a publication of Hyperjump Technology.

sections.p: Frontier News provides curated technology summaries and newsletter delivery based on publicly available video content. Summaries are informational and may be generated with language models.
Content is not legal, financial, or professional advice. Always verify critical decisions against primary sources linked in each summary.
Do not abuse subscription forms, scrape the service in ways that degrade availability, or redistribute content in violation of applicable law or source rights.

contact.title: Contact | Frontier News
contact.description: Contact the Frontier News team at Hyperjump Technology.
contact.intro: Reach the Frontier News team for partnership, press, or support questions.

preferences.title: Subscription preferences | Frontier News
preferences.description: Update your Frontier News delivery frequency, language, or unsubscribe.
preferences.intro: Change how you receive Frontier News, or stop emails entirely.
preferences.note: Preference changes require a confirmed subscriber email. Use the link in any Frontier News message to open a personalized preferences view.

notFound.title: Page not found | Frontier News
notFound.text: That page is not available. Return to the homepage to continue reading Frontier News.
